name: edit_file
description: Replace old_string with new_string in the file at path. old_string must occur exactly once in the file. To create a new file, pass an empty old_string and the full file contents as new_string.

path.description: Path to the file, relative to the workspace root.

old_string.description: The exact text to replace. Must be a unique substring of the file. Pass "" to create a new file.

new_string.description: The text to write in place of old_string.
